findings.title: Workspace root core/Cargo.toml polluted with I/O, async, and test dependencies
Tracing subscriber initialized with hardcoded defaults before config file is loaded
core crate (core/crates/core) gains I/O-adjacent dependency (url)
Background tasks not awaited during graceful shutdown
Build script rerun-if-changed paths resolve to non-existent files
Cli::parse() exit code 2 conflicts with ExitCode::InvalidInvocation (64)
web/ frontend scaffold out of scope for Phase 1
ConfigError::BindAddressInvalid variant missing from implementation
ShutdownSignal::wait() loops forever if signal handler panics before triggering
Test fixtures use hardcoded /tmp paths causing data_dir writability check failures
config_show.rs writes errors to stderr with raw writeln! after tracing is active
config show exit-code-2 path lacks integration test coverage
Pre-tracing line always written even for fast-exit commands (version, help)
DaemonConfig not passed into run_with_shutdown (stale reference)
findings.wont_fix_reason: false positive — config IS passed to run_with_shutdown in current code

findings.title: Signal tests use fixed 2-second sleep instead of readiness probe
coerce_value None arm is unreachable dead code
findings.wont_fix_reason: false positive — None arm IS reachable for Serde-defaulted fields absent from TOML

findings.title: Unknown TRILITHON_* env overrides are silently dropped
Write probe uses a fixed filename — concurrent processes collide
byte_offset_to_line_col uses byte arithmetic for column — wrong for multi-byte chars
TsWriterGuard buffer has no upper bound — unbounded memory growth
TsWriterGuard captures timestamp at flush time, not at event creation time
TsWriterGuard Drop silently swallows flush errors
Redaction tests only cover Unix endpoint and Keychain backend
Timestamp captured in get_or_now_unix_ts is racy under async scheduling
findings.wont_fix_reason: addressed by F021 — timestamp now captured at make_writer() time

findings.title: ShutdownController::trigger silently ignores send errors
Invalid RUST_LOG silently falls back without user-visible warning
Task panics exit with CleanShutdown=0 instead of a distinct error code
No test covers the JSON vs Pretty format dispatch path
ObsError::BadFilter variant has no unit test
ReadFailed doc comment does not note intentional POSIX distinction from Missing
ConfigError::InternalSerialise variant referenced in docs but missing
findings.wont_fix_reason: false positive — variant does not exist in the codebase

findings.title: nix version bumped beyond spec with extra features
daemon_loop signature should return Result not ()
findings.wont_fix_reason: false positive — current code already returns (), which is correct for Phase 1

findings.title: trigger_observable test has no timeout, can hang CI
version test regex too permissive — matches garbage output
ObsError lacks #[non_exhaustive]
BootError is an empty, unconstructable enum
resolve_format silently falls back to Pretty for any non-json value
StdEnvProvider::vars_with_prefix inconsistency with non-Unicode vars
config_show::run_inner uses anyhow::Error, erasing structured ConfigError
UtcSecondsLayer is inert in the Pretty log format path
Missing test for env override with non-Unicode value
Missing test for env override parse failure
Missing integration test for config show with missing or malformed config
EnvOverrideReason uses debug formatting in user-facing error messages
Signal tests may deadlock if subprocess stdout/stderr pipe buffers fill
ShutdownController::signal is dead code with a #[expect(dead_code)] suppression
vitest.config.ts duplicates @vitejs/plugin-react from vite.config.ts
pnpm-lock.yaml should be marked linguist-generated in .gitattributes
set_by_path does not validate empty key segments
build.rs git command fails silently in non-git environments
--version flag and version subcommand emit different formats
run_daemon config error uses raw writeln! instead of tracing
coerce_value falls back to TOML string parsing for unhandled variant types
Advisory: version counter overflow risk (learnings_match pattern)
findings.wont_fix_reason: advisory only — no Phase 1 code to change; apply when version counters are introduced

findings.wont_fix_reason: advisory only — no Phase 1 code to change; apply when SQLite transactions are introduced

findings.wont_fix_reason: advisory only — no Phase 1 code to change; apply when DB schema is introduced
